introSection: Mission Ferrari is a steel launched enclosed roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Mission Ferrari was first announced in late 2014 and was expected to open in 2016. It began testing in early 2021 and opened on 12 January 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is indoor and outdoor and contains 5 LSM launches and perhaps two inversions. It contains two 3D screens in the indoor section. Chinese firm Qiguang Group fabricated the track.

fullText:
Mission Ferrari is a steel launched enclosed roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

Mission Ferrari was first announced in late 2014 and was expected to open in 2016. It began testing in early 2021 and opened on 12 January 2023.

This ride is indoor and outdoor and contains 5 LSM launches and perhaps two inversions. It contains two 3D screens in the indoor section. Chinese firm Qiguang Group fabricated the track.
